introSection:
Star Mountain (known as Star World Mountain until 2008) is a steel roller coaster located at Beto Carrero World in Penha, Santa Catarina, Brazil. It previously operated at Ital Park as Corkscrew from July 8, 1980 to November 11, 1990.

The ride is located in the Aventura Radical section of Beto Carrero World. This is Portugese for "Radical Adventure".

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This ride is one of eight Corkscrew with bayerncurve models manufactured by Vekoma. It has a double corkscrew and a Bayerncurve.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: While at Ital Park, the ride had red track and white supports. When it arrived at Beto Carrero World, it was painted light-brown with light-blue supports. At some point, most likely 2006, the ride was repainted orange with dark-blue supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains were built by Arrow Dynamics. Riders are held in by over-the-shoulder harnesses.

fullText:
Star Mountain (known as Star World Mountain until 2008) is a steel roller coaster located at Beto Carrero World in Penha, Santa Catarina, Brazil. It previously operated at Ital Park as Corkscrew from July 8, 1980 to November 11, 1990.

The ride is located in the Aventura Radical section of Beto Carrero World. This is Portugese for "Radical Adventure".

This ride is one of eight Corkscrew with bayerncurve models manufactured by Vekoma. It has a double corkscrew and a Bayerncurve.

While at Ital Park, the ride had red track and white supports. When it arrived at Beto Carrero World, it was painted light-brown with light-blue supports. At some point, most likely 2006, the ride was repainted orange with dark-blue supports.

The trains were built by Arrow Dynamics. Riders are held in by over-the-shoulder harnesses.
